cases.prompt: Quiz me on the implementation so I can verify I understand the important parts.
cases.expected_behavior: Generates targeted questions to test understanding.

cases.prompt: Ask me a short set of questions about the feature I just built.
Explain the feature to me again.
cases.expected_behavior: This is explanation, not quiz generation.

cases.prompt: Make the quiz harder by including edge cases and trade-offs, not just definitions.
cases.expected_behavior: Tests deeper understanding and not just recall.
